full_text:
Yang Zhao (Xiuchu) 楊肇
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Zhao (楊肇), styledXiuchu, was born in Xiangyang. Sent to rescue Bu Chan, suffered horrendous defeat, retreat was a disaster. Sacked. Yang Zhao was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
